free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of the neutrons
with the energies from 5 to 8 MeV on cobalt
Proton-tritium. Gas tritium target at 1.8 atm
pressure. Proton current 1.5 microA, pulse frequency
Hollow cylinder of 5.1 cm high, 3.0 inner and 4.0 outer
diameters. Contains 4.15 mol Co-59. Place at 16.5 cm
Ni-58 foils of 8.8 and 8.5 mg/cm2 thickness.
where parts of total time resolution R-total are:
R1 - detector resolution and proton pulse duration,
R2 - dispersion due to finite size of sample and
R3 - dispersion due to non-monoenergy of incident
Neutron registration efficiency was defined by Cf-252
spontaneous fission neutron spectrum of T=1.42 MeV by
ionization chamber with thin Cf-252 layer.
For neutron attenuation, for multiple interactions.
Uncertainty of sample and monitor positioning.
elastic scattering definition at high energies.

Spectra were fitted by Maxwellian distribution as
SIG(E) ~ E*exp(-E/T) . T is given as KEM.
